title: Bulk clear notifications
excerpt:
There was a video explainer showing how to bulk close all of the updates in the inbox. When I do this it clears the updates by board. But when I log back in all the updates are there. 
I have 30,000 updates that need to …

posts.author: sam.foreman (Sam Foreman)
posts.cookedHtml:
There was a video explainer showing how to bulk close all of the updates in the inbox. When I do this it clears the updates by board. But when I log back in all the updates are there.

I have 30,000 updates that need to be cleared is there a way I can do this in bulk any help would be appreciated.

posts.author: sam.foreman (Sam Foreman)
posts.cookedHtml:
It appears doing it by board does work, but there is a limit to the total updates it will close at any one time.

It seems to me that is roughly 1000 updates per clear.

posts.author: rgomez (Ruben)
posts.cookedHtml: “Mark all as read” shows up when “all boards in my feed” is selected, but not “@ I was mentioned”, which is what the average user like myself is going to care about most. The option should show up on all tabs. It’s feasible to think a user might want to clear all updates s/he was mentioned in and not clear “All updates”
